summary: Mission v11.8 - Réparation du scroll Réserver VALIDATED. All UI features working: 1) Click Réserver on SA video scrolls to sessions-section with console log confirmation, 2) URL does NOT change after Réserver click, 3) 'Choisissez votre session' section visible after scroll, 4) Double-click on SA video does NOT redirect (play/pause only), 5) BOSS credit system active.

✅ Console logs confirm: '[SUPER-ADMIN] Scroll vers section offres', '[SUPER-ADMIN] ✅ Scroll effectué vers sessions-section'
